name: nnmc-it-board
description: NNMC IT Project Board - Full Stack Application

scripts.dev:all: npm-run-all --parallel dev:frontend dev:server dev:kpi dev:conf dev:journal
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../server-kpi && npm install && cd ../server-conf && npm install && cd ../server-priemnaya && npm install
